description: real benchmark extraction for Implement recovery key support for user storage providers

vars.prTitle: Create recovery keys in user storage or local
vars.prBody: Create recovery keys in user storage or local. Closes https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/issues/38445
vars.goldenComments: [{"comment":"Unsafe raw List deserialization without type safety. Calling Optional.get() directly on the Optional returned by RecoveryAuthnCodesUtils.getCredential(user) without checking isPresent() can lead to a NoSuchElementException if the Optional is empty.","severity":"Medium"},{"comment":"After creating the RecoveryAuthnCodesCredentialModel, consider setting its id from the stored credential (e.g., myUser.recoveryCodes.getId()); otherwise getId() will be null and downstream removal by id (e.g., removeStoredCredentialById in the authenticator flow) may not work.","severity":"Low"}]
